summary: Zhipu AI releases GLM-5, a new open-source AI model with enhanced coding capabilities and long-running agent tasks
LangChain releases Deep Agents, a structured runtime for planning, memory, and context isolation in multi-step AI agents
OpenViking is an open-source context database for AI agents, providing filesystem-based memory and retrieval
SILMA AI releases SILMA TTS, a lightweight open bilingual text-to-speech model
Tesla to launch Terafab project for AI chip manufacturing within a week
InnovAit AI launches AEO and GEO services for AI search visibility
Injective launches an AI developer toolkit for autonomous trading agents, enabling AI agents to trade perpetual futures and deploy contracts
Memori Labs launches the Memori OpenClaw plugin, bringing persistent AI memory to multi-agent gateways
Workable launches Workable Agent, an AI recruiting agent that helps teams define the job, source candidates, engage talent, and deliver qualified candidates
Genspark launches Genspark Claw, an AI employee that can execute multi-step work across real interfaces and return finished results
Instructure launches IgniteAI Agent, an agentic AI capability that automates complex workflows and provides a secure, transparent workflow capability
Microsoft launches Copilot Health for personalized health insights
NVIDIA releases Nemotron 3 Super, a 120B parameter open model for agentic AI systems, delivering 5x higher throughput
Databricks launches Genie Code for autonomous data engineering and science
Deepdub launches Phantom X 3.2, a new voice AI model for studio-grade dubbing and ultra-low latency voice agents
Google releases Gemini Embedding 2, a multimodal embedding model supporting text, images, video, audio, and documents in a single space
Kustomer launches standalone enterprise AI platform for modernizing helpdesks
Speakeasy launches MCP platform for building, securing, and observing AI agents
Amazon launches Health AI agent with free 24/7 virtual care for Prime members
Nvidia plans to launch an open-source AI agent platform
One Intelligence launches AI control plane for building and operating production AI
